jd_summary: HR Generalist supporting multi-site physical therapy operations. Key duties: interpret HR policies, analyze HR metrics, coach managers on ER issues, lead investigations, ADA guidance, job description maintenance, compliance with employment laws, policy/handbook updates. HRIS proficiency required (2+ yrs). Healthcare and BI/reporting experience preferred. Travel up to 10%.
sponsorship_note: No explicit sponsorship language detected. No 'does not sponsor', ITAR, or citizenship requirement found.
